title: EchoesRPG
description: EchoesRPG is a VERY DIFFICULT RPG Minecraft modpack, featuring new world generation, weapons, magic, structures and dungeons, free to explore!
body:
# Warning!
**EchoesRPG** is a new minecraft modpack, and a heavy one too, for comfortable experience (without having to close your browser and stuff like that) I would suggest you to have more than 8 gigabytes of RAM

---------------------------------------------------------
# Features

📝 No Quests, offering complete freedom to the player. 

🌍 100% New world generation, using mods like [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic).

![A modded landscape, with red and blue leafage on one side and default dark green on the other, a beautiful sight at the plains.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/924278dae8cee657b0d85dd0f5a0d106d4c0b6b4_0.webp)

🏰 Upgraded and changed almost every single vanilla structure, and introduced more than 200 of new ones by using mods like [When The Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Additional Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures), [YUNG'S "Better" series of mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG).

![A group of stone buildings, looking like a village.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e03a3c2bc6340fb9e69031e1a7b5e7f2e82577b5_0.webp)
![A beautiful sight at the mountains, with a dungeon built on top of them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9828f9553cd4c4b8331f41eb3f557ccaf725323a_0.webp)

🌲 New biomes as an addition to the world generation using mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)

![A beautiful modded landscape with gorgeous golden leafage.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6adb32cc34a6ddde4e762f74c9217d999084659_0.webp)

🍳 Improved cooking with mods like [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and a lot of addons for it, it also expands on other areas of cooking, not introduced to the game by mojang, by adding some mods from the [Let's Do] Series of mods, one of them being [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery) but there is much more to explore beyond just that one amazing mod!

📖 Magic tomes, actually, more than 30 of them! each one having atleast 4 abilities and more, a perfect exampel would be the [Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) mod, the abilities they allow the player to cast magic, like the name says, but some of them can have physical abilities, like multiple archer ones and other physical ones in general.

![4 water spells.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7af9b913047933a171094e56ff5b5128a035118f.png)

⚔️ A LOT of new weapons, too many to count but there are atleast 250+ and some of them have unique abilities thanks to the [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) mod, they also have unique attack animation that actually does something other than being just a cool animation, thanks to the updated combat from the mod called [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat).

![A lot of weapons from the modpack, mostly the ones with new abilities.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5d90fb16fd2aa7ab1600d5723620725d9d2fdc.png)

👻 Multiple powerful bosses, from mods like [Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) and a LOT of new mobs, both peaceful and agressive

![A player is shooting with fire balls at a big flower (The Void Blossom) while the big flower (boss) is spawning a huge wave of thorns at the player and all around the cave where the battle is happening](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/080a9dade2072287cc4d4f4f19bc2a2c1d728148_0.webp)


💥Almost 280 mods!

If you want to contact me, you can leave an email here echoesrpgcontact@gmail.com
